name: teach-gpt
description: Record a Linux workflow through native embedded controls, analyze it with GPT-5.6, review its process labels, and publish it as a reusable Codex skill.

interface.shortDescription: Turn Linux demonstrations into Codex skills
interface.longDescription: Teach GPT records an explicitly authorized Linux workflow, uses GPT-5.6 to create a richly labeled and reviewable process, assesses whether Codex can replay it, and publishes the reviewed result as a portable skill.
defaultPrompt: Teach Codex a workflow by recording me
Review and publish my latest taught process
List the workflows I taught Codex
